prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年持续上升（2021年162→2022年146→2023年142→2024年134→2025年141→2026年134），学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；2022年声誉中性/混合（投档线逐年下降引发关注，但学校正面回应维护形象）；2023年偏正面（食堂服务获好评）；抖音热度排名第86位（一般），未见明显负面舆情或断档信号；畜牧学A、作物学A-，均为该校传统优势学科，与农林特色高度契合，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，川农开设相关专业可吸引部分考生；河北省2026年高考总人数609800人，按近年物理类占比约59.5%估算约363000人，较2025年物理类363040人基本持平；省控线物理类本科批2021年412分→2025年459分，呈持续上升趋势，反映整体竞争环境趋紧；四川农业大学位于四川省（非本省），在河北省招生占比约2.3%（2025年），属跨省招生，地域偏好因素中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次小幅前移的走势、2026年计划小幅缩招（-2人）对竞争的加剧作用、学校软科排名持续上升带来的认可度提升、以及省控线上行反映的整体竞争趋紧，在2025年基准51275名基础上预计位次小幅前移；预测最低位次约50813名，区间50313–51313名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 31356 → 33822 → 40851 → 51876 → 51275. From 2021 to 2024, it continuously and significantly declined (cumulative decline of about 20520 places), and in 2025 it slightly advanced by about 600 places, with a baseline ranking of about 51275. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 119 in 2021, 120 in 2022, 122 in 2023, 121 in 2024, and 125 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 123, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.6%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years (2021: 162 → 2022: 146 → 2023: 142 → 2024: 134 → 2025: 141 → 2026: 134), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, reputation was neutral/mixed (the declining admission cutoff scores attracted attention, but the university responded positively to maintain its image). In 2023, it was slightly positive (cafeteria services received praise). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 86th (average), with no obvious negative public opinion or signal of a cutoff drop. Animal Science is rated A, Crop Science A-, both traditional advantageous disciplines closely aligned with the university's agriculture and forestry characteristics, which have some appeal for applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended. Sichuan Agricultural University offers related majors, which can attract some candidates. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Gaokao examinees is 609,800. Estimated Physics Category examinees, based on the recent proportion of about 59.5%, are about 363,000, roughly the same as the 363,040 in 2025. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has been rising: 412 in 2021 → 459 in 2025, reflecting an overall tightening competitive environment. Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Sichuan Province (not the home province), and its enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 2.3% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with neutral regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight forward movement of rankings in 2025, the intensifying effect of the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-2 students), the increased recognition from the university's rising Soft Science ranking, and the overall tightening competition reflected by the rising provincial control line, based on the 2025 baseline of 51,275, the ranking is expected to advance slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 50,813, with a range of 50,313–51,313.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 50,313–51,313, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<50,313), focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Electronic Science and Technology and Internet of Things Engineering. If the ranking is near the upper bound of the range (>51,313), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors and consider the cost-effectiveness of the university's advantageous disciplines (e.g., Agronomy, Animal Science).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 134th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with an overall upward trend in recent years, and a stable university level. Animal Science is rated A, Crop Science A-, but the History Category majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Social Work) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature majors have social popularity, while teacher training/education majors are in a wait-and-see phase. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in the 2025 ranking (due to the doubling of the plan to 8 students), the substantial reduction in the 2026 plan (back to 4 students) leading to significantly intensified competition, a slight increase in the total number of examinees, and the upward trend of the provincial control line, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will noticeably move backward compared to 2025, returning to levels close to 2021–2023. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3762, with a range of 3262–4262.
